revision.comment: 新規立項（[[奈良時代]]の[[貴族]]）
revision.text:
'''百済王 利善'''（くだらのこにきし りぜん、生年不詳 - [[延暦]]3年[[5月24日 (旧暦)|5月24日]]（[[784年]][[6月16日]]））は、[[奈良時代]]の[[貴族]]。[[刑部省|刑部卿]]・[[百済王敬福]]の子。[[官位]]は[[従四位|従四位下]]・[[散位寮|散位頭]]。
== 経歴 == [[称徳天皇|称徳朝]]の[[天平神護]]元年（[[765年]]）[[従五位|従五位下]]に[[叙爵]]し、翌天平神護2年（[[766年]]）[[飛騨国#国司|飛騨守]]に任ぜられる。
[[光仁天皇|光仁朝]]でも[[宝亀]]2年（[[771年]]）[[讃岐国#国司|讃岐員外介]]と地方官を務めたのち、宝亀7年（[[776年]]）従五位上、宝亀10年（[[779年]]）[[正五位|正五位下]]、[[天応 (日本)|天応]]元年（[[781年]]）正五位上、[[延暦]]2年（[[783年]]）[[従四位|従四位下]]と、光仁朝末から[[桓武天皇|桓武朝]]初頭にかけて順調に昇進した。
延暦3年（[[784年]]）5月24日：[[崩御#卒去|卒去]]。最終[[官位]]は[[散位寮|散位頭]]従四位下。
== 官歴 == 『[[続日本紀]]』による。 *時期不詳：[[正六位|正六位上]] *[[天平神護]]元年（[[765年]]） 閏10月6日：[[従五位|従五位下]] *天平神護2年（[[766年]]） 3月26日：[[飛騨国#国司|飛騨守]] *[[宝亀]]2年（[[771年]]） 7月23日：[[讃岐国#国司|讃岐員外介]] *宝亀7年（[[776年]]） 正月7日：従五位上 *宝亀10年（[[779年]]） 正月23日：[[正五位|正五位下]] *[[天応 (日本)|天応]]元年（[[781年]]） 4月15日：正五位上。5月25日：[[散位寮|散位頭]] *[[延暦]]2年（[[783年]]） 10月16日：[[従四位|従四位下]] *延暦3年（[[784年]]） 5月24日：[[崩御#卒去|卒去]]（散位頭従四位下）
== 系譜 == *父：[[百済王敬福]]<ref name="kmk"> 栗原信充考訂『百済王三松氏系図』</ref> *母：不詳 *生母不詳の子女 **男子：百済王忠信<ref name="kmk" /> **男子：[[百済王忠宗]]（767-830）<ref name="kmk" />
== 脚注 == {{reflist}}
== 参考文献 == *[[宇治谷孟]]『続日本紀 （中）』[[講談社]]〈[[講談社学術文庫]]〉、1992年 *宇治谷孟『続日本紀 （下）』講談社〈講談社学術文庫〉、1995年 *[[宝賀寿男]]『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会、1986年
{{DEFAULTSORT:くたらのこにきし りせん}} [[Category:奈良時代の貴族]] [[Category:百済王氏|りせん]] [[Category:8世紀生]] [[Category:784年没]]

{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 百済王利善 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[奈良時代]] | 生誕 = 不明 | 死没 = [[延暦]]3年[[5月24日 (旧暦)|5月24日]]（[[784年]][[6月16日]]） | 改名 = | 別名 = | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = [[従四位|従四位下]]・[[散位寮|散位頭]] | 主君 = [[孝謙天皇|称徳天皇]]→[[光仁天皇]]→[[桓武天皇]] | 氏族 = [[百済王氏]] | 父母 = 父：[[百済王敬福]] | 兄弟 = [[百済王理伯|理伯]]、[[百済王武鏡|武鏡]]、'''利善'''、[[百済王玄鏡|玄鏡]]、難波姫 | 妻 = | 子 = 忠信、[[百済王忠宗|忠宗]] | 特記事項 = }}
'''百済王 利善'''（くだらのこにきし りぜん）は、[[奈良時代]]の[[貴族]]。[[刑部省|刑部卿]]・[[百済王敬福]]の子。[[官位]]は[[従四位|従四位下]]・[[散位寮|散位頭]]。
== 経歴 == [[孝謙天皇|称徳朝]]の[[天平神護]]元年（[[765年]]）[[従五位|従五位下]]に[[叙爵]]し、翌天平神護2年（[[766年]]）[[飛騨国#国司|飛騨守]]に任ぜられる。
[[光仁天皇|光仁朝]]でも[[宝亀]]2年（[[771年]]）[[讃岐国#国司|讃岐員外介]]と地方官を務めたのち、宝亀7年（[[776年]]）従五位上、宝亀10年（[[779年]]）[[正五位|正五位下]]、[[天応 (日本)|天応]]元年（[[781年]]）正五位上、[[延暦]]2年（[[783年]]）従四位下と、光仁朝末から[[桓武天皇|桓武朝]]初頭にかけて順調に昇進した。
延暦3年（[[784年]]）5月24日卒去。最終官位は散位頭従四位下。
== 官歴 == 『[[続日本紀]]』による。 *時期不詳：[[正六位|正六位上]] *[[天平神護]]元年（[[765年]]） 閏10月6日：[[従五位|従五位下]] *天平神護2年（[[766年]]） 3月26日：[[飛騨国#国司|飛騨守]] *[[宝亀]]2年（[[771年]]） 7月23日：[[讃岐国#国司|讃岐員外介]] *宝亀7年（[[776年]]） 正月7日：従五位上 *宝亀10年（[[779年]]） 正月23日：[[正五位|正五位下]] *[[天応 (日本)|天応]]元年（[[781年]]） 4月15日：正五位上。5月25日：[[散位寮|散位頭]] *[[延暦]]2年（[[783年]]） 10月16日：[[従四位|従四位下]] *延暦3年（[[784年]]） 5月24日：卒去（散位頭従四位下）
== 系譜 == *父：[[百済王敬福]]<ref name="kmk"> 栗原信充考訂『百済王三松氏系図』</ref> *母：不詳 *生母不明の子女 **男子：百済王忠信<ref name="kmk" /> **男子：[[百済王忠宗]]（767-830）<ref name="kmk" />
== 脚注 == {{reflist}}
== 参考文献 == *[[宇治谷孟]]『続日本紀 （中）』[[講談社]]〈[[講談社学術文庫]]〉、1992年 *宇治谷孟『続日本紀 （下）』講談社〈講談社学術文庫〉、1995年 *[[宝賀寿男]]『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会、1986年

revision.comment: 「百済王三松氏系図」は信頼に値しない系図であると 上野利三「「百済王三松氏系図」の史料価値について：律令時代の帰化人の基礎的研究[https://core.ac.uk/download/pdf/145790992.pdf]」で証明されているため、それに関わる記述を削除。

'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).
== Notes ==
{{Reflist}}
== References == * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Middle)*. {{ill|Kōdansha|ja|講談社}} (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1992. * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Lower)*. Kōdansha (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1995. * Hoga, T. *Kodai Shizoku Keifu Shūsei*. Kodai Shizoku Kenkyūkai, 1986.

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).
== Notes ==
{{Reflist}}
== References == * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Middle)*. {{ill|Kōdansha|ja|講談社}} (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1992. * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Lower)*. Kōdansha (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1995. * Hoga, T. *Kodai Shizoku Keifu Shūsei*. Kodai Shizoku Kenkyūkai, 1986.

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).
== Notes ==

== References == * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Middle)*. {{ill|Kōdansha|ja|講談社}} (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1992. * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Lower)*. Kōdansha (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1995. * Hoga, T. *Kodai Shizoku Keifu Shūsei*. Kodai Shizoku Kenkyūkai, 1986.

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).
== Notes ==
{{Reflist}}
== References == * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Middle)*. {{ill|Kōdansha|ja|講談社}} (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1992. * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Lower)*. Kōdansha (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1995. * Hoga, T. *Kodai Shizoku Keifu Shūsei*. Kodai Shizoku Kenkyūkai, 1986.

== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).
== Notes ==
{{Reflist}}
== References == * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Middle)*. {{ill|Kōdansha|ja|講談社}} (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1992. * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Lower)*. Kōdansha (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1995. * Hoga, T. *Kodai Shizoku Keifu Shūsei*. Kodai Shizoku Kenkyūkai, 1986.

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).
== Notes ==
{{Reflist}}
== References == * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Middle)*. {{ill|Kōdansha|ja|講談社}} (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1992. * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Lower)*. Kōdansha (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1995. * Hoga, T. *Kodai Shizoku Keifu Shūsei*. Kodai Shizoku Kenkyūkai, 1986.

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).
== Notes ==
{{Reflist}}
== References == * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Middle)*. {{ill|Kōdansha|ja|講談社}} (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1992. * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Lower)*. Kōdansha (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1995. * Hoga, T. *Kodai Shizoku Keifu Shūsei*. Kodai Shizoku Kenkyūkai, 1986.

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.

'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | Image = | Image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | image = | image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | image = | image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).
== Notes ==
{{Reflist}}
== References == * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Middle)*. {{ill|Kōdansha|ja|講談社}} (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1992. * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Lower)*. Kōdansha (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1995. * Hoga, T. *Kodai Shizoku Keifu Shūsei*. Kodai Shizoku Kenkyūkai, 1986.

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | image = | image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).
