{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | image = | image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | image = | image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏}} | Parents = | Notes = }}
'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}.
== Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).
== Notes ==
{{Reflist}}
== References == * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Middle)*. {{ill|Kōdansha|ja|講談社}} (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1992. * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Lower)*. Kōdansha (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1995. * Hoga, T. *Kodai Shizoku Keifu Shūsei*. Kodai Shizoku Kenkyūkai, 1986.

{{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | image = | image Size = | Caption = | Period = {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|12=draft}} | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=draft}} | Lord = {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇|12=draft}} | Clan = {{ill|Kudara no Konikishi clan|ja|百済王氏|12=draft}} | Parents = | Notes = }} '''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|ja|奈良時代|12=draft}}. His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=draft}}. == Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇|12=draft}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護|12=draft}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護|12=draft}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=draft}}. During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇|12=draft}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=draft}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応|12=draft}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft}}. He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=draft}}. == Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=draft}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=draft}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=draft}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=draft}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade). == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Middle)*. {{ill|Kōdansha|ja|講談社|12=draft}} (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1992. * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Lower)*. Kōdansha (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1995. * Hoga, T. *Kodai Shizoku Keifu Shūsei*. Kodai Shizoku Kenkyūkai, 1986. <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> {{draft categories| }}

His official rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=draft}}. == Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|ja|孝謙天皇|12=draft}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護|12=draft}} 1 (765), he was granted the rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|ja|天平神護|12=draft}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=draft}}. During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|ja|光仁天皇|12=draft}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=draft}} in {{ill|Hōki|ja|宝亀|12=draft}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応|12=draft}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} 2 (783), he reached the rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft}}. He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=draft}}. == Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|ja|続日本紀|12=draft}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=draft}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=draft}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=draft}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=draft}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=draft}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=draft}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade). == Notes == {{Reflist}} == References == * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Middle)*. {{ill|Kōdansha|ja|講談社|12=draft}} (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1992. * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Lower)*. Kōdansha (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1995. * Hoga, T. *Kodai Shizoku Keifu Shūsei*. Kodai Shizoku Kenkyūkai, 1986. <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon--> <!--Baekje King Rizeon-->

'''百済王 利善'''（くだらのこにきし りぜん）は、[[奈良時代]]の[[貴族]]。[[官位]]は[[従四位|従四位下]]・[[散位寮|散位頭]]。
== 経歴 == [[孝謙天皇|称徳朝]]の[[天平神護]]元年（[[765年]]）[[従五位|従五位下]]に[[叙爵]]し、翌天平神護2年（[[766年]]）[[飛騨国#国司|飛騨守]]に任ぜられる。
[[光仁天皇|光仁朝]]でも[[宝亀]]2年（[[771年]]）[[讃岐国#国司|讃岐員外介]]と地方官を務めたのち、宝亀7年（[[776年]]）従五位上、宝亀10年（[[779年]]）[[正五位|正五位下]]、[[天応 (日本)|天応]]元年（[[781年]]）正五位上、[[延暦]]2年（[[783年]]）従四位下と、光仁朝末から[[桓武天皇|桓武朝]]初頭にかけて順調に昇進した。
延暦3年（[[784年]]）5月24日卒去。最終官位は散位頭従四位下。
== 官歴 == 『[[続日本紀]]』による。 *時期不詳：[[正六位|正六位上]] *[[天平神護]]元年（[[765年]]） 閏10月6日：[[従五位|従五位下]] *天平神護2年（[[766年]]） 3月26日：[[飛騨国#国司|飛騨守]] *[[宝亀]]2年（[[771年]]） 7月23日：[[讃岐国#国司|讃岐員外介]] *宝亀7年（[[776年]]） 正月7日：従五位上 *宝亀10年（[[779年]]） 正月23日：[[正五位|正五位下]] *[[天応 (日本)|天応]]元年（[[781年]]） 4月15日：正五位上。5月25日：[[散位寮|散位頭]] *[[延暦]]2年（[[783年]]） 10月16日：[[従四位|従四位下]] *延暦3年（[[784年]]） 5月24日：卒去（散位頭従四位下）
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 参考文献 == *[[宇治谷孟]]『続日本紀 （中）』[[講談社]]〈[[講談社学術文庫]]〉、1992年 *宇治谷孟『続日本紀 （下）』講談社〈講談社学術文庫〉、1995年 *[[宝賀寿男]]『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会、1986年
{{DEFAULTSORT:くたらのこにきし りせん}} [[Category:百済王氏|りせん]] [[Category:奈良時代の貴族]] [[Category:従四位下受位者]] [[Category:8世紀生]] [[Category:784年没]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:百済王利善]][[ko:구다라노코니키시 리젠]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0750|death_date={{death date|0874|6|16}}|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Kudara no Konikishi Kyōfuku|qid=Q11580791}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q45828447]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | image = | image Size = | Caption = | Period = [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Lord = [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Kōken]] → [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] → [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] | Clan = [[:en:Kudara no Konikishi clan|Kudara no Konikishi clan]] | Parents = | Notes = }} '''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. His official Rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Biography == In the [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Kōken]]'s reign, during [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 1 (765), he was granted the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In the following year, [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}. During the [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]]'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 2 (783), he reached the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Career Timeline == According to the [[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正六位}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida redirects to 正五位}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade). == Notes == {{Reflist|qq=}} == References == * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Middle)*. In the following year, [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}. During the [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]]'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 2 (783), he reached the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Career Timeline == According to the [[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth His official Rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Biography == In the [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Kōken]]'s reign, during [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 1 (765), he was granted the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In the following year, [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}. During the [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]]'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 2 (783), he reached the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Career His official Rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Biography == In the [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Kōken]]'s reign, during [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 1 (765), he was granted the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In the following year, [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}. During the [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]]'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 2 (783), he reached the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). His official Rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Biography == In the [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Kōken]]'s reign, during [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 1 (765), he was granted the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In the following year, [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}. During the [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]]'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 2 (783), he reached the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Career Timeline == According to the His official Rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Biography == In the [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Kōken]]'s reign, during [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 1 (765), he was granted the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. During the [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]]'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:百済王利善]][[ko:구다라노코니키시 리젠]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:百済王利善]][[ko:구다라노코니키시 리젠]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0750|death_date={{death date|0874|6|16}}|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Kudara no Konikishi Kyōfuku|WD=Q11580791}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q45828447]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | image = | image Size = | Caption = | Period = [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Lord = [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Kōken]] → [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] → [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] | Clan = [[:en:Kudara no Konikishi clan|Kudara no Konikishi clan]] | Parents = | Notes = }} '''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. His official Rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Biography == In the [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Kōken]]'s reign, during [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 1 (765), he was granted the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In the following year, [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}. During the [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]]'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 2 (783), he reached the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Career Timeline == According to the [[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank, <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:百済王利善]][[ko:구다라노코니키시 리젠]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:百済王利善]][[ko:구다라노코니키시 리젠]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:百済王利善]][[ko:구다라노코니키시 리젠]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=0750|death_date={{death date|0874|6|16}}|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|father={{ill|Kudara no Konikishi Kyōfuku|WD=Q11580791}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q45828447]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox Kuge | Name = Kudara no Konikishi Rizen (百済王利善) | image = | image Size = | Caption = | Period = [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]] | Birth Date = Unknown | Death Date = [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 3, 5th month, 24th day (June 16, 784) | Renamed = | Alias = | Posthumous Name = | Deity Name = | Buddhist Name = | Grave = | Rank = {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}・{{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Lord = [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Kōken]] → [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]] → [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]] | Clan = [[:en:Kudara no Konikishi clan|Kudara no Konikishi clan]] | Parents = | Notes = }} '''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the [[:en:Nara period|Nara period]]. His official Rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Biography == In the [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Kōken]]'s reign, during [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 1 (765), he was granted the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In the following year, [[:en:Tenpyō-jingo|Tenpyō-jingo]] 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}. During the [[:en:Emperor Kōnin|Emperor Kōnin]]'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Hōki|Hōki]] 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). In [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 2 (783), he reached the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Career Timeline == According to the [[:en:Shoku Nihongi|Shoku Nihongi]]: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank, Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 His official Rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Biography == In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|WD=Q232955|lt=Empress Kōken}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|WD=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo}} 1 (765), he was granted the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|WD=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}. During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|en|Emperor Kōnin|WD=Q958662|lt=Emperor Kōnin}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|WD=Q18520676|lt=Hōki}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 2 (783), he reached the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}. He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Career Timeline == According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|WD=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi}}: * Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正六位}} * Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}} * Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} * Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} * Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} * Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade). == Notes == {{Reflist|qq=}} == References == * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Middle)*. {{ill|Kodansha|en|Kodansha|WD=Q726081|lt=Kōdansha}} (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1992. * Ujitani, T. *Shoku Nihongi (Lower)*. Kōdansha (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), 1995. * Hoga, T. *Kodai Shizoku Keifu Shūsei*. Kodai Shizoku Kenkyūkai, 1986.

'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}}. His official Rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Biography ==
In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|WD=Q232955|lt=Empress Kōken}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|WD=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo}} 1 (765), he was granted the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|WD=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|en|Emperor Kōnin|WD=Q958662|lt=Emperor Kōnin}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|WD=Q18520676|lt=Hōki}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 2 (783), he reached the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Career Timeline ==
According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|WD=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi}}:
* Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正六位}}
* Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}
* Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}
* Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}
* Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}
* Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}
* Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

== Biography ==
In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|WD=Q232955|lt=Empress Kōken}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|WD=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo}} 1 (765), he was granted the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|WD=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|en|Emperor Kōnin|WD=Q958662|lt=Emperor Kōnin}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|WD=Q18520676|lt=Hōki}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 2 (783), he reached the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Career Timeline ==
According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|WD=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi}}:
* Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正六位}}
* Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}
* Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}
* Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}
* Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}
* Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}
* Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).

'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period}}. His official Rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Biography ==
In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|WD=Q232955|lt=Empress Kōken}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|WD=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo}} 1 (765), he was granted the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|WD=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|en|Emperor Kōnin|WD=Q958662|lt=Emperor Kōnin}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|WD=Q18520676|lt=Hōki}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 2 (783), he reached the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

* Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}

'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|WD=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}. His official Rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Biography ==
In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|WD=Q232955|lt=Empress Kōken|1=Empress Kōken}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|WD=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo|1=Tenpyō-jingo}} 1 (765), he was granted the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|WD=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo|1=Tenpyō-jingo}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1056535}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|en|Emperor Kōnin|WD=Q958662|lt=Emperor Kōnin|1=Emperor Kōnin}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|WD=Q18520676|lt=Hōki|1=Hōki}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 2 (783), he reached the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

'''Kudara no Konikishi Rizen''' (百済王利善) was a noble of the {{ill|Nara period|en|Nara period|qid=Q189178|lt=Nara period|1=Nara period}}. His official Rank was {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} and he held the post of {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Biography ==
In the {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|qid=Q232955|lt=Empress Kōken|1=Empress Kōken}}'s reign, during {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|qid=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo|1=Tenpyō-jingo}} 1 (765), he was granted the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}. In the following year, {{ill|Tenpyō-jingo|en|Tenpyō-jingo|qid=Q1373181|lt=Tenpyō-jingo|1=Tenpyō-jingo}} 2 (766), he was appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1056535}}.
During the {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|en|Emperor Kōnin|qid=Q958662|lt=Emperor Kōnin|1=Emperor Kōnin}}'s reign, he served as {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|qid=Q18520676|lt=Hōki|1=Hōki}} 2 (771). His promotions included {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in Hōki 7 (776), {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in Hōki 10 (779), and {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}} in {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1 (781). In {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 2 (783), he reached the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}.
He passed away on the 24th day of the 5th month in Enryaku 3 (784). At the time of his death, his official position was {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Career Timeline ==
According to the {{ill|Shoku Nihongi|en|Shoku Nihongi|qid=Q611399|lt=Shoku Nihongi|1=Shoku Nihongi}}:
* Unknown date: {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正六位上|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正六位}}
* Tenpyō-jingo 1 (765), Intercalary 10th month, 6th day: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}
* Tenpyō-jingo 2 (766), 3rd month, 26th day: Appointed {{ill|Governor of Hida Province|ja|飛騨守|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Governor of Hida Province|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 飛騨国|1=Hida Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1056535}}
* Hōki 2 (771), 7th month, 23rd day: Appointed {{ill|Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐員外介|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Assistant Governor of Sanuki Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Hōki 7 (776), 1st month, 7th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}}
* Hōki 10 (779), 1st month, 23rd day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|正五位下|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}
* Ten'ō 1 (781), 4th month, 15th day: Promoted to {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|ja|正五位上|1=Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正五位}}. 5th month, 25th day: Appointed {{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Enryaku 2 (783), 10th month, 16th day: Promoted to {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}
* Enryaku 3 (784), 5th month, 24th day: Passed away ({{ill|San'i no Kami|ja|散位頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/San'i no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade).
